name: TeamDocs
tagline: Your team's knowledge base without the per-seat pricing
metaDescription: TeamDocs replaces Notion with a collaborative workspace built into AppBuster. Write docs, build wikis, and organize knowledge — saving $1,152/year.
heroSvg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><text x="50" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-size="60">📝</text></svg>

features.title: Rich Document Editor
features.desc: Write with a block-based editor that supports headings, tables, code blocks, embeds, and callouts. Slash commands let your team create structured content without touching a toolbar.

features.title: Real-Time Collaboration
features.desc: Multiple team members can edit the same document simultaneously with live cursors and presence indicators. Inline comments and @mentions keep discussions in context.

features.title: Team Wiki
features.desc: Organize knowledge into nested pages with sidebar navigation. Pin critical docs, archive outdated ones, and let your team find answers through full-text search.

features.title: Permission Controls
features.desc: Set view, comment, or edit access at the workspace, folder, or individual page level. Share specific pages externally with password-protected public links.

features.title: Version History
features.desc: Every edit is automatically saved with full revision history. Compare versions side-by-side and restore any previous state with one click.

features.title: Templates & Databases
features.desc: Create reusable page templates for meeting notes, project briefs, and SOPs. Build structured databases with custom properties, filters, and views.
